name: create_project
description: Create a new project in the workspace with a name and optional description.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Detailed description of the project's purpose and scope.
parameters.example: Plan and track all product features for Q2 2026

parameters.name: team
parameters.description: Team GID to create the project in.
